title: Selena Gomez: My Mind & Me
posterAlt: Selena Gomez: My Mind & Me (2022) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After years in the limelight, Selena Gomez achieves unimaginable stardom. But just as she reaches a new peak, an unexpected turn pulls her into darkness. This uniquely raw and intimate documentary spans her six-year journey into a new light.
synopsis: Released in 2022, Selena Gomez: My Mind & Me is a documentary and music film from United States. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
